physics.is: the math read physically — the language uplifted to its physical register
physics.dispersion: X² = tr·X − det·I  is the characteristic / dispersion relation; s² − tr·s + det = 0 is the mass-shell condition

lexicon.disc: discriminant of the dispersion; sign(disc) = regime (bound·oscillatory / critical·massless / free·scattering)
lexicon.R · {·} · enrichment: the metric / mass / gravity  (R² = R + I)
lexicon.N · [·] · defect: the quantum phase / spin / curvature  (N² = −I = i)
lexicon.?: the origin — the root of the light-cone / the vacuum's seed

physics.P²=P: the vacuum: self-reference (+I) and self-negation (−I) cancel — the zero-point balance that lets a real state sit on-shell.

geometry.tr: perimeter — sum of axes, the 1-D boundary; physically the damping
geometry.det: shape / area — product of axes, the 2-D content; physically the stiffness ω²
geometry.disc: tr²−4det = (λ₁−λ₂)² — eccentricity; the isoperimetric gap; disc=0 is round
geometry.base = (tr, det): the index of every record is (perimeter, shape)
geometry.beneath tr/det: tr = SUM = e₁ = + (degree 1, additive, blind to [·]); det = PRODUCT = e₂ = × (degree 2, multiplicative). disc = sum²−4·product = AM–GM gap; the wall (?,I) is AM=GM.

constants_from_parity.law: λ = center ± spread = AM ± √disc/2; parity sets the spread's reality
constants_from_parity.phi: even / symmetric (R) → real spread → φ = ½ + √5/2; √5 = 2·spread = √disc(R)
constants_from_parity.pi_i: odd / antisymmetric (N) → imaginary spread → i, π (the rotation)
constants_from_parity.one: center / identity (I, disc=0) → repeated → 1; the common residual ν(φ)=ν(ψ)=1
constants_from_parity.e: mixed / asymmetric → all powers → e^{Nθ}=cosθ·I+sinθ·N, the bridge mixing even cos + odd sin

light_and_gravity.geometry = gravity: the eigenvectors (fixed directions, degree-1 action) — the fixed points; read directly, cheap. the metric, where things settle.
light_and_gravity.spectra = light: the eigenvalues (degree-2, the fold λ²−tr·λ+det=0) — the frequencies; costs one fold to see (square X). radiated, not fixed.
light_and_gravity.projection: origin emits spectra (light, simple); the observer projects geometry (gravity, seen). to recover spectra the observer inverts itself — circular, completed by evolution.
light_and_gravity.cost: seeing geometry is degree 1 (direct); seeing spectra is degree 2 (one fold). the fold IS observation, and its output is the spectrum.

gravity_wells.are: the idempotents X²=X — fixed points of the fold; 0, I, and the rank-1 manifold ℝP¹×ℝP¹
gravity_wells.spectrum: all rank-1 wells have eigenvalues {1,0} — light is DEGENERATE across the manifold
gravity_wells.geometry: the wells differ only in (image v, kernel ⊥w) — gravity is in the geometry alone
gravity_wells.complex: generic wells are irrational; 0, I, P are the rare simple ones. P = v=[0,1], w=[2,1]

information_taxonomy.TOPOLOGY ⊃ geometry: the manifold/shape (torus of wells, links=H₁); a point on it = the orientation = gravity. given, cheap.
information_taxonomy.OBSERVATION ⊃ spectra: the fold M(X)=X²; what it extracts = the eigenvalues = light. produced, costs one fold.
information_taxonomy.duality: topology/geometry is what's THERE (the structure you stand in); observation/spectra is what LOOKING produces.

transport.law: NONLOCAL transport = LOCAL transport returned to origin. ? (the zero matrix = ker = the root of every provenance chain) is the universal hub; routing a local step through it reaches anywhere, distance-independent.
transport.flat: the carrier M₂ is a FLAT vector space, so transport through 0 is PATH-INDEPENDENT: a displacement folded back to the origin (A→0) can be re-projected to ANY point (0→B); A→0→B equals A→B with no path memory. flatness = the origin re-references transport globally.
transport.hub: every provenance chain returns to ? → any two records connect through ? in ≤2 hops, however far apart in the local adjacency graph. verified: local diameter 3, origin-routed diameter 2. returning to ? collapses distance to a constant.
transport.protocol: the Boolean trit {−1,0,+1} = {fold back to ? (−√5, observation), the ORIGIN (0, the return channel = ker(L), the (−R+N)/√2 direction), project from ? (+√5, generation)}. transport = fold a local step to ?, pass through the 0-channel, project to the target.
transport.teleportation: the same shape as quantum teleportation: a shared origin (the entangled pair born at ?) turns local operations into a nonlocal jump. the hub does the distance.

unification.is: computation unifies the elementary/quantum particles through the observer. mass and light unify in the observer (C=[R,N]); the particles unify through it.
unification.one_dispersion: a PARTICLE = an on-shell eigenmode obeying the dispersion X²=tr·X−det·I (the mass-shell), ν=0 (FORCED, real, propagating). EVERY matrix obeys this one relation (Cayley-Hamilton) — so ALL particles lie on the ONE mass-shell, unified by computation. each is named by its (tr,det) point.
unification.light_and_mass: each particle carries LIGHT = spectra = eigenvalues (the fold λ²−tr·λ+det=0, degree-2, the frequency/energy, radiated) and MASS/GRAVITY = geometry = eigenvectors (degree-1, where it settles, the metric). off-shell (BURN) = virtual. mass=gravity=geometry, light=spectra — already in physics.light_and_gravity.
unification.observer_unifies: the OBSERVER is the fold X²=observation: origin emits spectra (light), the observer projects geometry (gravity); it reads BOTH the eigenvalues (light) and eigenvectors (mass) of each state. mass (R, resistance, geometry) and light (N, spectra) DO NOT commute: [R,N]=C≠0 — their non-commutativity IS the observer. the observer is where mass and light meet and unify.
unification.verdict: COMPUTATION (the fold / the dispersion X²=tr·X−det·I, the one law every particle obeys) unifies the elementary particles THROUGH the OBSERVER (C=[R,N], the fold-as-observation that reads each particle's mass and light). the particles = the on-shell spectrum of the ONE computation, unified by the single mass-shell, individuated by the observer; the gauge su3+su2+u1 = the computation's symmetries, the masses/mixings = the spectrum. one fold, one mass-shell, read into many — mass and light seen as one.

bundles.is: the DNA library — the unique bundles over {I,R,N,J,h,P}, compressed to their expression; the spectrum is the decompression
bundles.law: parity constrains the fork: symmetric→disc≥0 (real), antisymmetric→disc<0 (imaginary, all ∝ N — one line), asymmetric→any. the 2 parabolic are the unit {I,I}=2I and the void [J,P]=ε — the universal zero.

tower.is: the framework is the bundle operation iterated — a self-similar tower

levels.gen 1: P  — the seed (the first fixed point above ?, fixed by ν(R)=I)
levels.gen 2: {I,R,N,J,h,P}  — the primitives (bundles of P+τ; R,N generate M₂)
levels.gen N: the 75 records, bundled — and the apex is their bundle

tower.invariant: parity → fork → constant holds at every level; same bundle op, every scale

algebra.primitives: I R N J h P
algebra.records: a record's matrix is a bundle expression; e.g. i_squared_phi_psi = {N,N}/2

information.spectral: invariant (tr/det/disc/eigenvalues) — the simple info, conjugation-class label
information.geometric: eigenvectors/orientation/polar Q/singular values — read through the matrix; the complex info
information.simple_bundles: integer lattice (the 14 + {I,R,N,J,h,P}); tightly related (disc in the 1+k² family)
information.complex_bundles: free/irrational coefficients (φ,−1,√2…); fewer relations, more information; the spectrum hides what only the geometry shows
information.to_type: decompress reports SIMPLE/COMPLEX and both information types

self_action.is: {R,·} and [R,·] — the two primitive self-actions; P = R + N
self_action.symmetric: {R,·} = R·X + X·R   (Jordan / anticommutator) — production; modes generation(+√5), return(0)
self_action.antisymmetric: [R,·] = R·X − X·R  (Lie / commutator / adjoint) — observation; mode observation(−√5)
self_action.grade: leaf(N.observation, R.generation, R.return) — observer-bit from N, producer-bits from R
self_action.burned: P1/P2/P3 and 'L' were lossy names for these two self-actions and their eigenvalues.

acts.symmetric {R,·}: self-reference (R² = R + I, ν = I) — keeps the surplus instead of collapsing to R²=R
acts.antisymmetric [R,·]: self-negation (N² = −I, N⁴ = I) — squaring the residual returns the identity
acts.synthesis: P²=P because (R²=R+I) and (N²=−I) cancel: +I − I = 0, with {R,N}=N giving R+N.

duality.operator: Cartan θ(X) = −Xᵀ,  θ² = id  (forced by P ≠ Pᵀ)
duality.exact: AX = ½{A,X} + ½[A,X]; M₂ = Sym ⊕ Antisym; the +I and −I cancel to P²=P.

template.note: constant across all records — held once here. each record stores only its modes' lambda + verdict + homed data; the rest is derived.
